blocks.text: El Derbi Madrileño: Real Madrid's title hopes on the line at the Bernabéu
Barcelona sit 4 points clear at the top. A Real Madrid win keeps the pressure on — a slip here and the title is effectively done. Atlético, 9 points back, need a derby upset to stay relevant.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese Grand Prix at Suzuka, Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points
